response.justification: The candidate brings strong foundational software engineering skills, staff-level experience, and is currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq. However, they lack Python expertise (a required primary language), no demonstrated knowledge of vector databases or RAG architectures, and insufficient depth in production AI/ML systems. While they show potential to grow into the role, they don't clearly meet the core AI/ML and technical requirements for a Staff-level position.
strengths: 16+ years of software development with multiple staff-level roles demonstrating technical leadership
Strong TypeScript and Node.js expertise with current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work at re:cinq
Proven mentoring and technical education through workshops, courses, and Refactoring Dojos
concerns: No Python experience despite it being a required primary language for the role
Lacks demonstrated expertise in vector databases and RAG architectures—critical required knowledge
Only ~13 months of direct AI/ML infrastructure experience, far short of the required 8+ years in production AI solutions

key_factors.factor: Current MCP and agentic workflow experience at re:cinq
No demonstrated vector database or RAG knowledge
